scripts.env:local: sh -c 'cp apps/web/.env.local.local apps/web/.env.local && echo "Now using LOCAL Supabase in apps/web/.env.local"'
scripts.env:prod: sh -c 'cp apps/web/.env.local.prod apps/web/.env.local && echo "Now using PROD Supabase in apps/web/.env.local"'
scripts.env:which: sh -c 'if [ -f apps/web/.env.local ]; then grep "^VITE_SUPABASE_URL=" apps/web/.env.local; else echo "apps/web/.env.local is missing"; fi'
scripts.dev:local: npm run env:local && npm run dev
scripts.dev:prod: npm run env:prod && npm run dev
scripts.db:types: sh -c 'tmp="$(mktemp -t plumboard-database-types)" && supabase gen types --lang=typescript --linked --schema public > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" packages/core/src/database.types.ts'
